docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACEVES-GONZALEZ, ROSAVRA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO
